name: Plasma Reaper
effect_text: Priority Fire. Overclock. Critical Strike. Deal 13 damage.
flavor_text: The reaper. The gun the old squadron never liked to clean. Kept firing regardless.

name: Chrono Cannon
effect_text: Phase Drive. Quick Strike. Priority Fire. Deal 12 damage first.
flavor_text: Fires through last week and into next week. Both weeks remember the round.

name: Twin Fusion
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Linked Fire. Priority Fire. Deal 6 damage twice; second +2.
flavor_text: Two cores firing in sync. The sync is the hard part. Cores are not subtle.

name: Arc Storm
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Chain Catalyst. Overclock. Deal 12; adjacent 4; next card +2.
flavor_text: A storm that hops ship to ship. Each hop polite, measured, bringing its own receipt.

name: Shadowbeam
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Deal 16 damage, unseen.
flavor_text: The gun the fleet refuses to itemize. The shipyard welds it in anyway.

name: Quad Salvo
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike. Priority Fire. Deal 8 damage twice, first.
flavor_text: Four tubes empty in the same beat. The ship spends the beat smiling quietly.

name: Ion Destroyer
effect_text: Critical Strike. Radiation Leak. Priority Fire. Deal 16; 4 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: A quiet gun. A loud afterword. The enemy learns the afterword from the inside.

name: Siege Spike
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Critical Strike. Overflow Fire. Deal 16; excess hits ship.
flavor_text: Arms slowly. Arrives politely. Leaves nothing the engineers want itemized.

name: Nova Cannon
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 16; adjacent 5; 3 radiation.
flavor_text: A bottled star. Uncorked on a schedule. Drinks the room dry before anyone notices.

name: Reaper Lance
effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Overclock. Deal 20 damage, first.
flavor_text: The gun in the admiral's office. The admiral had it mounted before retirement.

name: Void Breaker
effect_text: Phase Drive. Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 20; excess to ship; 4 radiation.
flavor_text: Breaks something that does not want to be broken. The fleet writes up the paperwork.

name: Apocalypse Gun
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Alpha Strike. Priority Fire. Deal 10 twice; adjacent 4.
flavor_text: Not the worst weapon on the manifest. Still the loudest one anybody voluntarily checks out.

name: Siege Master
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Cascading Power. Critical Strike. Deal 20 damage; +1 per non-unit card.
flavor_text: Patient gun. Patient pilot. Patient enemy, at least until the third minute.

name: Hyper Cannon
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Critical Strike. Deal 12 twice, first.
flavor_text: Designed to make test pilots laugh nervously. The pilots still ask for it.

name: Void Storm
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Overflow Fire. Deal 24; adjacent 6; 5 radiation.
flavor_text: Happens on the sensor suite, not the eye. The sensor suite lies down afterwards.

name: Stellar Spike
effect_text: Critical Strike. Phase Drive. Overflow Fire. Deal 24 damage; bypasses most blockers.
flavor_text: Born in a shipyard that no longer exists. Still listed on its manifest.

name: Planetary Cannon
effect_text: Priority Fire. Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 28; excess to ship; 5 radiation.
flavor_text: The gun treaty writers argued about for six months. The enemy gets the summary.

name: Sky Reaver
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Skyward Maneuver. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Climbs past the ceiling of the fight. Picks its angle down. Picks its target personally.

name: Phantom Elite
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Phase Drive.
flavor_text: Never on the sensor. Never in the manifest. Never the first thing the enemy remembers.

name: Terror Bomber
effect_text: Critical Breach: deal 6 damage. Hot Deploy. Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: Carries ordnance the fleet no longer lists. Delivers it before anyone can read the manifest.

name: Guardian Elite
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Stood at the last gate of the last port. Still standing. Still quietly collecting thanks.

name: Bomber Overlord
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Critical Breach: deal 8 damage. Alpha Strike.
flavor_text: Runs every sortie twice. Lands once. Drops a long note into the plating.

name: Phantom Siege
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Critical Strike. Phase Drive.
flavor_text: Arrives from nowhere. Leaves through the same nowhere. The enemy files a strongly worded nowhere.

name: Warchief
effect_text: Battle Hardened. Priority Fire. Outrider.
flavor_text: Takes the front. Holds the front. Rewrites the definition of the front, casually.

name: Siege Overlord
effect_text: Priority Fire. Cold Boot 1. Alpha Strike.
flavor_text: Warms up loud. Fires louder. The siege lasts exactly as the overlord intends.

name: Phantom Overlord
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Does the work of three invisible drones. The paperwork remains efficient.

name: Guardian Overlord
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Stands. Falls. Stands again. The morale officer has a hymn for it, quietly.

name: Fleet Admiral
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: Commands the wing from the middle. Never loses a wingman without a reason.

name: Capital Terror
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Critical Breach: deal 10. Cold Boot 1.
flavor_text: Warms up loud. Arrives louder. Leaves quiet, because there is not much left that moves.

name: Apex Destroyer
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: The last name on the roster. The first name on the enemy's complaint letter.

name: Prime Command
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Overclock. Chain Catalyst.
flavor_text: The command line the fleet admiral keeps on autologin. Nobody audits it anymore.

name: Master Scanner (Epic)
effect_text: Persistent Field. Probe 2 each turn. Deep Scan. Tactical Draw.
flavor_text: Reads the deck above. Reads the deck below. Writes the pilot's briefing compiled.

name: Prime Fortress
effect_text: Persistent Field. Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating.
flavor_text: Stands every wall at attention. Every wall listens. Every wall outlasts the argument.

name: Master Uplink
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Linked Fire. Chain Catalyst.
flavor_text: Every gun in the fleet on one line, on the same heartbeat. The heartbeat wins.

name: Prime Shield (Epic)
effect_text: Persistent Field. Auto-Repair 2. Emergency Reboot. Adaptive Learning.
flavor_text: Every bad afternoon gets the same quiet treatment. Every good afternoon still thanks it.

name: Ghost Overmind
effect_text: Persistent Field. Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Phase Drive.
flavor_text: Writes the fleet out of the enemy sensor. Keeps the fleet written out indefinitely.

name: Commander Elite
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Rapid Launch. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: The voice on every comm at once. Every pilot listens. Every pilot knows the drill.

name: Supreme Heat
effect_text: Persistent Field. Overclock. Efficiency Protocol. Cascading Power.
flavor_text: The reactor runs past the gauge. The gauge apologizes. The fleet keeps its lead.

name: Prime Hunter
effect_text: Persistent Field. Tracking Lock. Priority Fire. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Writes the target's name on every instrument panel in the fleet. Target learns late.

name: Apex Master
effect_text: Persistent Field. Adaptive Learning. Efficiency Protocol. Chain Catalyst.
flavor_text: Learns from every fight. Remembers every fight. The fights arrive easier and easier.

name: Ultimate Commander
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike.
flavor_text: Commands the fleet in one breath. The fleet obeys on the same breath, loudly.

name: Prime Overmind
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Chain Catalyst. Linked Fire.
flavor_text: Every gun reads the same page at the same moment. They close the book together.

name: Grand Supreme
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Overclock. Cascading Power.
flavor_text: The program the fleet's flagship refuses to discuss. The flagship runs it anyway.

name: Master Fortress (Epic)
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating. Auto-Repair.
flavor_text: The pattern every fortress after it tried to imitate. None quite got there.

name: Aegis Lord
effect_text: Ablative Plating 2. Emergency Reboot. Reinforced Hull. System Shielding.
flavor_text: Four patterns welded into one frame. Each pattern trusts the other three completely.

name: Phase Master
effect_text: Phase Drive. Gain Stealth. Reinforced Hull. Evade 40%.
flavor_text: Half the wall is elsewhere. Elsewhere is where most enemy rounds end up.

name: Apex Barrier
effect_text: Interceptor. Ablative Plating 2. Auto-Repair 2. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Takes the hit. Knits the seam. Repeats. The fleet reinstalls it on every hull.

name: Stealth Master
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Evade 40%. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Never on the map. Never in the briefing. Never the first thing the enemy remembers.

name: Grand Fortress (Epic)
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Battle Hardened. Gains power from damage taken.
flavor_text: Takes hits until hits feed it. Then the hits look small. Then nothing looks small.

name: Titanic Lord
effect_text: Ablative Plating 3. Reinforced Hull. Emergency Reboot. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Every mission log lists this one as the thing that came home. Every time.

name: Fortress Supreme
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating 2. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: The wall the admiral stands behind during every briefing. The wall the admiral trusts.

name: Phase Supreme
effect_text: Phase Drive. Reinforced Hull. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Half the wall argues with the next universe over. Both halves refuse to fall together.

name: Aegis Supreme
effect_text: Ablative Plating 4. Auto-Repair 3. Emergency Reboot. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Four patterns, four patiences, one promise: this hull stays where the pilot parked it.

name: Citadel Lord
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Stands at the gate. Has stood there since before the gate had a name.

name: Primordial Bastion
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating 3. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Older than the fleet. Older than the enemy fleet. Patient as both fleets combined.

name: Master Warhead (Epic)
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 18; adjacent 5; 3 radiation.
flavor_text: The shell engineers leave on the top rack. The top rack has the special lock.

name: Disruption Master
effect_text: Signal Jamming. Disable. Data Wipe. All enemies disabled next turn; discard 1.
flavor_text: A loud minute on the enemy's comm. Nothing goes through. Nothing comes back.

name: Stasis Lock
effect_text: Tractor Beam Hold. Disable. Apply Lock. Freeze target 3 turns; skips refresh on return.
flavor_text: A small quiet room with a large quiet lock. The target enters. Does not leave.

name: Overmind Bomb
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Phase Drive. Deal 22; adjacent 5; excess to ship.
flavor_text: Arrives through a crack in the sensor band. The crack is not in the manual.

name: Quantum Storm
effect_text: Phase Drive. Radiation Leak. Critical Strike. Deal 20 damage; 5 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: A shell that goes through the other ship sideways. Leaves a trail inside.

name: Master Override (Epic)
effect_text: Hack/Corrupt. Transform/Overhaul. Disable. Take control of up to 2 enemy Drones.
flavor_text: Speaks two words to the enemy fleet. The fleet answers in your own colors.

name: Nano Master
effect_text: Auto-Repair 4. Emergency Reboot. Restore 20 HP and stabilize for 2 turns.
flavor_text: Tiny careful hands across the whole hull. Every seam closes. Every pilot exhales.

name: Reality Warp
effect_text: Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Overflow Fire. Deal 25; bypasses blockers.
flavor_text: Reality blinks once. The enemy ship is somewhere that does not agree with reality anymore.

name: Nuclear Master
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Overflow Fire. Deal 28; adjacent 7; 5 radiation.
flavor_text: The shell the fleet signs for in triplicate. Nobody wants the last copy.

name: Temporal Bomb
effect_text: Phase Drive. Radiation Leak. Breach Cascade. Deal 30; adjacent 7; 6 radiation over 3.
flavor_text: Goes off in three different moments at once. All three moments agree on the outcome.

name: Grand Nuke
effect_text: Priority Fire. Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Overflow Fire. Deal 36; adjacent 10; 7 radiation.
flavor_text: The shell in the vault behind the vault. Both vaults require separate clearance.

name: Master Priority
effect_text: All your Weapons gain Priority Fire and Alpha Strike this turn.
flavor_text: One word over the comm. Every gun on the ship doubles up and goes first.

name: Phantom Strike (Epic)
effect_text: Phantom Echo. Gain Stealth. Create decoy of target enemy that fights for you; remain unseen.
flavor_text: Copies the enemy's best drone. Tells the copy whose side it is on.

name: Chaos Warp
effect_text: Transform/Overhaul. AI Takeover. Target enemy Drone becomes friendly and attacks its owner.
flavor_text: The drone reads the new order, crosses the field, does not look back.

name: Master Defense
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn; restore 8 HP.
flavor_text: A small word over the comm. A large wall around the ship briefly.

name: Apex Strike
effect_text: All your Weapons gain Critical Strike, Overclock, and Priority Fire this turn.
flavor_text: The fleet commits. The reactor commits. The enemy commits to leaving, exactly late enough.

name: Master Warp
effect_text: All your units gain Phase Drive and Evade 50% this turn.
flavor_text: The whole fleet steps sideways for a heartbeat. Nobody lands. Nobody writes it up.

name: Total Charge
effect_text: All your Weapons fire with Priority Fire, Alpha Strike, and Critical Strike this turn.
flavor_text: No plan. No retreat. Every weapon resolving on the same loud heartbeat. Nothing left unused.

name: Grand Defense
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn; restore 5 HP to each friendly unit.
flavor_text: The whole fleet breathes in. Nothing lands. The fleet breathes out, patched and quiet.

name: Supreme Strike
effect_text: All your Weapons and Drones attack with Priority Fire, Alpha Strike, Critical Strike.
flavor_text: The fleet strikes once. The fleet strikes twice. The enemy does not strike anything back.

name: Master Scope (Epic)
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Priority Fire, Critical Strike, Tracking Lock, Alpha Strike.
flavor_text: Four lenses. Four opinions. One very calm pilot on the trigger, agreeing with all.

name: Elite Cloak
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains Gain Stealth, Cloaked Entry, Evade 50%, Phase Drive.
flavor_text: The cloak the drone wears to work. The drone never takes it off.

name: Master Plating
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +8 defense, Reinforced Hull, Ablative Plating, Auto-Repair.
flavor_text: Thicker, stubborner, quieter. The drone wears it like it was born into it, eventually.

name: Fleet Network
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your ship gains Crew Pooling, Cascading Power, Efficiency Protocol.
flavor_text: One wire down the spine of the fleet. Every ship reads the same quiet heartbeat.

name: Supreme Targeting
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Priority Fire, Critical Strike, Alpha Strike, Tracking Lock.
flavor_text: Four names on the target's ticket. Four ways the ticket gets punched, first.

name: Phantom Rig
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains Gain Stealth, Cloaked Entry, Phase Drive, Evade 50%.
flavor_text: The drone puts this on for work. The work happens. Nobody writes up the drone.

name: Apex Armor
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +8 defense, Reinforced Hull, Ablative Plating, Auto-Repair.
flavor_text: Worn by the drone that comes back. Always comes back. The fleet never asks why.

name: Grand Uplink
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your units gain Priority Fire, Rapid Launch, Cascading Power.
flavor_text: One wire into every ship at once. One heartbeat. One quiet sentence. The fleet moves.

name: Apex Zone
effect_text: Environmental. All units gain Priority Fire and Rapid Launch. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: A region of fast decisions. Every pilot inside learns to answer before being asked.

name: Chaos Storm
effect_text: Environmental. Breach Cascade effects trigger twice; Radiation Leak lasts +1 turn. Replaces.
flavor_text: A region where nothing small stays small. Every fire feeds the next fire by invitation.

name: Phase Region
effect_text: Environmental. All units gain Phase Drive and Gain Stealth. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: A region where existing is a suggestion. The ships inside take it seriously.

name: Fortress Region
effect_text: Environmental. All Defense units gain Interceptor, Ablative Plating, Auto-Repair. Replaces.
flavor_text: Every wall in the region finds a second wind. Every wall keeps standing.

name: Supreme Battleground
effect_text: Environmental. All units gain Priority Fire and Alpha Strike. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: Every gun finishes the sentence first. Every gun has the second sentence ready.

name: Chrono Field
effect_text: Environmental. Deferred Deployment. Reactive. Phase Drive. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: Time waits politely for the fleet. The fleet uses the wait to finish sentences.

name: Elite Fighter Core
effect_text: Passive: Your first Weapon each turn has Priority Fire and costs 1 less.
flavor_text: The core every elite squadron has under the floor panel. The panel never lists it.

name: Sniper Mount
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Critical Strike and Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Long tube. Long patience. A pilot who agreed to both on the first afternoon.

name: Stabilizer Plate
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains Reinforced Hull and Auto-Repair 1.
flavor_text: A quiet weight under the drone's ribs. The drone flies with more confidence.

name: Phase Rig
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your ship gains Phase Drive and Gain Stealth for 2 turns.
flavor_text: Two drawers on the console. Both drawers open at once. The ship steps out quietly.

name: Battle Harness
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains Battle Hardened and Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: The drone wears the harness to work. The work is loud. The harness is louder.

name: Energy Matrix
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your ship gains Overclock and Efficiency Protocol.
flavor_text: Runs the reactor a little hot. Runs the ledger a little cold. Both end even.

name: Fleet Formation
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Drones gain +1/+1 while this is in play.
flavor_text: Every wingman reads the same heartbeat. Every wingman slots into the correct bracket.

name: Targeting Field
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons gain Priority Fire while this is in play.
flavor_text: A grid across the sky. Every gun under it finds a faster trigger this afternoon.

name: Recon Region
effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: Probe 1.
flavor_text: A region watched by small invisible eyes. The eyes write a short note each evening.

name: Master Conduit
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your ship gains Crew Pooling, Cascading Power, Efficiency Protocol.
flavor_text: One wire through the fleet. Every ship finds its quiet twin on the other end.

name: Stealth Region
effect_text: Environmental. All units gain Gain Stealth and Cloaked Entry. Replaces.
flavor_text: Every ship in the region becomes a rumor. The enemy files the rumor, keeps firing.
